lines: Preceptor Voss has slates pinned under one boot and mud on both cuffs.
"If Caldus calls this a camp again, make him count latrine nails. A camp has rest. This has paperwork with damp corners."
"New breakers learn bells before blades. A missed bell wastes a squad before the enemy gets a turn."
"After that, they learn how to stand still while a farmer begs for mercy with someone else's mouth."

choices.label: Leave Voss to the drill yard

lines: "Runa issues what the writ allows. Maev sells what the writ forgot. Everyone calls that corruption until they need dry beans."
"The road survives on doctrine, wax seals, and people pretending the third column in the ledger does not exist."
